title: Political and legal
summary: 9609 A Level — political stability, regulation, and legal constraints on business.
learningObjectives: Apply PESTLE political/legal to case firms.

simpleExplanation.title: Government and the law
simpleExplanation.summary: Political decisions and legal frameworks shape where and how firms operate, from tax policy to employment law.
steps: Compliance can be barrier or advantage.

sections.content: **Political and legal** (6.1.1) opens **Topic 6 PESTLE**. Use **specific laws or policies** from the case country.
